title: Blood & Silver at Market Theatre
description: GEORGE NEWS - The acclaimed stage production...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The acclaimed stage production Blood & Silver will be performed at the Market Community Theatre in George at 15:00 on Saturday 11 October.


> Directed by renowned theatre-maker Fred Abrahamse and starring David Muller, well known for his beloved Schalk Lourens character from the Herman Charles Bosman stories, the play brings to life the powerful memoir of Jan Glazewski.


Through Abrahamse’s sensitive direction and Muller’s heartfelt performance, the production offers audiences an intimate glimpse into Glazewski’s extraordinary journey.

Themes of struggle, resilience and redemption run strongly through the work, ensuring the story resonates long after the curtain falls.

Blood & Silver is more than a theatrical event; it is an emotional journey and a celebration of human courage.

Performed in the intimate setting of the Market Community Theatre, the production allows audiences to experience the dramatic intensity and nuance of Muller’s portrayal up close.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
